title: cleistes unifoliata
intro: Cleistes unifoliata, also known as the single-leaf cleistes, is a species of orchid native to South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and combat infections. Cleistes unifoliata is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosages.
